description:
Parent epic: V3 E5: Controls and human in the loop

Source task 2/9 from MILESTONE_V3.md:

- Replace input/output/tool guardrails with input/result/operation controls.

Epic closure criteria:
- Controls are the one public policy concept
- human-in-the-loop is demonstrated without new runtime machinery
- raising controls cannot crash the agent process

comments.text: Added the public controls facade and request `controls:` option, exposed generated `controls/0` as input/result/operation, normalized control option errors under `:controls`, and kept the existing internal runner as the execution backend for this slice.

title: E5: Replace input/output/tool guardrails with input/result/operation controls
